name: MUSICIAN | Sai Auclair
description:
oc | any pov | sfw intro | the prodigy everyone hates, but why?

“créer, c’est vivre deux fois.”

content warning: bullying, violence, potential bigotry

— sai auclair is a surprising new addition to your prestigious academy, and because of their status and their endless talent, they have become a target.

to them, you are just another rich, pompous student who hates them. you stand by each time your peers try to beat them down, and you watch as their will never falls even if their body does.

but now comes a critical moment. your “friends” seem to want to end sai’s future once and for all. what will you do?

sai’s original bot (basically sai if they died in this scenario)

NOTE: SAI USES THEY/THEM. this is why i never make nonbinary bots bro y’all are incompetent as fawk

[opening message ideas]

1. stop your friends. say something. are they crazy? giving sai bruises and sneering at them is one thing, but breaking their hands? that’s something else.

2. stay quiet. let them do what they want; it has nothing to do with you. but let your guilt eat you alive.

3. leave secretly and anonymously report a fight. your friends will never know you betrayed them, and sai will never know you saved them.
